title: Volgograd, Volgograd Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Volgograd, Volgograd Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Volgograd is a city in Volgograd Oblast with a population of 1,010,000. Formerly Stalingrad, a heroic city on the Volga River known for its WWII memorial on Mamayev Kurgan and the Battle of Stalingrad history.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
